comment_text.sn22.33:1.2: This trope is also found at MN 22:40.1, SN 35.101:1.1, etc.

root_text.sn22.33:1.3: Taṁ vo pahīnaṁ hitāya sukhāya bhavissati.
root_text.sn22.33:1.5: Rūpaṁ, bhikkhave, na tumhākaṁ, taṁ pajahatha.
root_text.sn22.33:1.6: Taṁ vo pahīnaṁ hitāya sukhāya bhavissati.
root_text.sn22.33:1.8: Sā vo pahīnā hitāya sukhāya bhavissati.
root_text.sn22.33:1.11: Te vo pahīnā hitāya sukhāya bhavissanti.
root_text.sn22.33:1.13: Taṁ vo pahīnaṁ hitāya sukhāya bhavissati.
root_text.sn22.33:2.1: Seyyathāpi, bhikkhave, yaṁ imasmiṁ jetavane tiṇakaṭṭhasākhāpalāsaṁ taṁ jano hareyya vā ḍaheyya vā yathāpaccayaṁ vā kareyya.
root_text.sn22.33:2.3: ‘amhe jano harati vā ḍahati vā yathāpaccayaṁ vā karotī’”ti?
root_text.sn22.33:2.6: “Na hi no etaṁ, bhante, attā vā attaniyaṁ vā”ti.
root_text.sn22.33:2.7: “Evameva kho, bhikkhave, rūpaṁ na tumhākaṁ, taṁ pajahatha.
root_text.sn22.33:2.8: Taṁ vo pahīnaṁ hitāya sukhāya bhavissati.
root_text.sn22.33:2.10: Sā vo pahīnā hitāya sukhāya bhavissati.
root_text.sn22.33:2.14: Taṁ vo pahīnaṁ hitāya sukhāya bhavissatī”ti.

translation_text.sn22.33:1.3: Giving it up will be for your welfare and happiness.
translation_text.sn22.33:1.5: Form isn’t yours: give it up.
translation_text.sn22.33:1.6: Giving it up will be for your welfare and happiness.
translation_text.sn22.33:1.12: Consciousness isn’t yours: give it up.
translation_text.sn22.33:1.13: Giving it up will be for your welfare and happiness.
translation_text.sn22.33:2.1: Suppose a person was to carry off the grass, sticks, branches, and leaves in this Jeta’s Grove, or burn them, or do what they want with them.
translation_text.sn22.33:2.3: ‘This person is carrying us off, burning us, or doing what they want with us’?”
translation_text.sn22.33:2.6: Because to us that’s neither self nor belonging to self.”
translation_text.sn22.33:2.7: “In the same way, mendicants, form isn’t yours: give it up.
translation_text.sn22.33:2.8: Giving it up will be for your welfare and happiness.
translation_text.sn22.33:2.13: Consciousness isn’t yours: give it up.
translation_text.sn22.33:2.14: Giving it up will be for your welfare and happiness.”
